Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fox Dream]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Rulers on the Path of the White Fox use aura of light and dreams to trap enemies in a Fox Dream.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Fox Dream is an illusion technique that settles around a target's head like a cage.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Fox Dream is a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Fox Dream is a technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Fox Dream is an aura or effect Lindon can use.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Fox Dream technique is described as flawed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — The Fox Dream is a technique woven from dream aura.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Fox Dream is a technique used by Kelsa to seize dream aura and create distracting illusions.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
